purpose: Leave a public, machine-readable trail of GitHub work observed over the previous 7 days for future reviewers and followers.

query_family: pull requests authored by jsonwisdom updated 2026-06-04..2026-06-11
limitations: This is not a full local filesystem audit.
This does not independently recompute every hash.
A pull request is not treated as proof admission by itself.
Green is not implied unless replay evidence is independently verified.

summary.secondary_cluster: AL validation, replay, schema, CI, and keccak bridge work
summary.plain_english_takeaway: The last 7 days of GitHub work centered on turning CRP from symbolic language into repo-visible machinery: witness workflows, replay receipts, validation harnesses, schema/API/UI contracts, and public canon surfaces. Not every artifact is admitted proof; several correctly preserve pending/yellow/no-fake-green posture.

recommended_reader_path: Start with public-proof PR #2 for the Witness #002 workflow.
Read public-proof PR #3 to understand merge receipt boundaries.
Inspect highlighted public-proof commits from 2026-06-11 for replay receipt and validation fixture evolution.
Inspect AL PR #315 and PR #319 together to understand PASS metadata versus atomic merge surface correction.
Inspect JOY, HEIDEE, COMPUTERWISDOM, and Welcome-to-JSONWISDOM PRs as canon/public-language surfaces, not authority grants.
follow_trail.required_caution: Do not treat this trail file as final proof. It is an index and continuity map for humans and future agents.
